name: Syntrix Fabric IQ-style Ontology
description: Synthetic semantic model for users, work signals, agent opportunities, blueprints, governance, evaluation, and learning updates.

UserProfile.description: Synthetic role or workspace view analyzed by Syntrix.

WorkSignal.description: Synthetic Copilot-style interaction or work-context signal.

WorkPattern.description: Repeated workflow revealed by multiple work signals.

AgentOpportunity.description: Scored opportunity to design a personalized agent.

GovernanceGate.description: Control required before sensitive or write-capable actions.

EvaluationCase.description: Test case used to validate a blueprint before deployment.

LearningLoopUpdate.description: Controlled recommendation to improve a blueprint after observing new signals.
